---
title: "Teaching"
---

I teach undergraduate and graduate courses in mathematics, probability, and statistics. My teaching interests include mathematical statistics, robust statistics, statistical computing, and quantitative methods.

## Current Teaching

- **National University of Luján**
  - Undergraduate courses in mathematics and statistics.

- **University of Buenos Aires**
  - Graduate courses in Mathematical Statistics.
  
-   **National University of Hurlingham**
  - Graduate course in Probability.

## Teaching Interests

I am interested in teaching mathematical statistics, robust statistics, semiparametric and nonparametric methods, statistical computing with R, and quantitative methods for interdisciplinary applications.

## Teaching Material

Lecture notes and freely available educational resources can be found on the **Resources** page.
